motivation: Establish PPO performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: COMPLETE 45/45. Avg Q4=550. Wins 7/15 games vs PQN. Dominates: Phoenix (9x), Solaris (5.7x), NameThisGame (1.7x), MsPacman, DoubleDunk, Alien, PrivateEye. Fails: Enduro(0), MontezumaRevenge(0), Venture(0). Low: Breakout(1.4), Amidar(2.2).

motivation: Establish PQN performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: COMPLETE 45/45. Avg Q4=391. Wins 4/15 games vs PPO. Dominates: Amidar (14.5x), BattleZone (1.5x), SpaceInvaders (1.9x), Breakout (1.3x). Fails: Enduro(0), MontezumaRevenge(0), Venture(0). Low: DoubleDunk(-24), Phoenix(87).

motivation: Add LayerNorm to PPO NatureCNN — known plasticity intervention from CHAIN-SP paper
comment: COMPLETE 15/15 at 10M. Avg Q4=479 vs PPO(40M)=550. 8/15 games >= 40M baseline at 1/4 training! PrivateEye Q4=71 vs -135 (sign reversal!). Needs 40M rerun. Score: wins 3, loses 5, ties 7 vs PPO(40M). Strong sample efficiency: 13/15 within 25%.

motivation: Add Normalize-and-Project to PQN — complement existing LayerNorm, top plasticity method from Plasticine
comment: COMPLETE 15/15 at 10M. Avg Q4=380 vs PQN(40M)=391. BEST sample efficiency: 12/15 games >= 40M baseline at 10M! BattleZone +15%, Solaris +26%. Only NameThisGame below 75%. Needs 40M rerun. Score: wins 6, loses 4, ties 5 vs PQN(40M).

motivation: Full CHAIN-SP approach: LayerNorm + churn reduction loss for PPO
comment: COMPLETE 15/15 at 10M. Avg Q4=515 vs PPO(40M)=550. Close to h003 but Phoenix dramatically better (969 vs 628). NameThisGame exceeds 40M baseline (2567 vs 2348). Score: wins 6, loses 6, ties 3 vs PPO(40M). Needs 40M rerun.
